how_it_works: Since 3.15, quality on most skill gems grants a secondary effect rather than flat damage. 20/20 gems (level 20, 20% quality) can be vendored with a Gemcutter's Prism to reset to level 1 with 20% quality. Awakened gems drop in endgame (from Sirus, Maven, etc.) and have a max level of 5, granting stronger effects than the base version.
tips: Sell 20/20 gems of popular skills for good profit — check poe.ninja for current values.
Awakened Empower/Enhance/Enlighten level 4+ are extremely valuable — worth keeping.
Alternate quality (Anomalous, Divergent, Phantasmal) gems can be acquired via Tempering Orbs.

gems.name: Empower Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% chance to gain a Power Charge when Supported Skill is used per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 4+ grants +2 to gem level (vs +1 for base levels 2-3). Level 5 grants +3.
gems.notes: Core support for any skill where high gem level matters (Arc, Fireball, minion skills).

gems.name: Enlighten Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% mana reservation efficiency per 1% quality
gems.notes: Level 3 reduces reservation by an extra 9%. Used in aura builds stacking multiple auras.

gems.name: Enhance Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% quality bonus per 1% quality (multiplicative)
gems.notes: Level 4 grants +24% quality bonus. Best used on gems that scale with quality (e.g. Cyclone).

gems.name: Faster Attacks Support
gems.quality_effect: Supported skills have 0.5% increased attack speed per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: +9% increased attack speed bonus vs +8% for base gem at level 20.
gems.notes: Workhorse support for attack builds.

gems.name: Faster Casting Support
gems.quality_effect: Supported skills have 0.5% increased cast speed per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: +9% increased cast speed bonus vs +8% for base.
gems.notes: Core support for most spell builds.

gems.name: Added Cold Damage Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% chance to freeze per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: adds more cold damage than base gem + grants chill effect on top.
gems.notes: Used in cold skill builds and for freeze-chaining.

gems.name: Added Fire Damage Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% chance to ignite per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: adds substantially more fire damage than base gem.
gems.notes: Core support for fire builds; good for ignite prolif via quality.

gems.name: Added Lightning Damage Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% chance to shock per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: significantly more lightning damage than base.
gems.notes: Used in lightning builds and shock-stacking strategies.

gems.name: Brutality Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.25% chance to deal Double Damage per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: 15% more physical damage (vs 10% at base level 20).
gems.notes: Prevents all elemental/chaos damage from supported skills — physical-only builds.

gems.name: Vicious Projectiles Support
gems.quality_effect: Supported skills have 0.5% increased projectile speed per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: stronger more physical damage bonus than base gem.
gems.notes: Physical projectile builds (Tornado Shot, Kinetic Blast, etc.).

gems.name: Burning Damage Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% increased burning damage per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: significantly more burning damage; supported skills also grant Cannot be Frozen.
gems.notes: Ignite and burning builds. The Cannot be Frozen bonus at level 5 is a notable defensive perk.

gems.name: Deadly Ailments Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% increased duration of ailments on enemies per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: stronger ailment damage bonus than base.
gems.notes: Best-in-slot for ignite, bleed, and poison builds. Reduces hit damage.

gems.name: Unbound Ailments Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% increased duration of ailments on enemies per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: increases effect of non-damaging ailments by more than base.
gems.notes: Key for chill/freeze magnitude stacking and shock effect maximization.

gems.name: Multistrike Support
gems.quality_effect: Supported skills have 0.5% increased attack speed per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: more repeat damage than base gem.
gems.notes: Mandatory for most melee attack builds. 3 repeats at increasing damage multipliers.

gems.name: Fork Support
gems.quality_effect: Supported skills have 0.5% increased projectile speed per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: projectiles fork twice instead of once.
gems.notes: Great for clear when combined with chain or pierce.

gems.name: Cyclone
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% chance to deal Double Damage per 1% quality
gems.notes: Double damage quality is strong. Popular melee skill — 20/20 has consistent market value.

gems.name: Raise Spectre
gems.quality_effect: +1% to maximum number of Raised Spectres per 50% quality
gems.notes: Level 21 grants a 5th spectre slot — extremely valuable for spectre builds. Vendor 20/20 + GCP to get.

gems.name: Summon Skeletons
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% increased Skeleton Movement Speed per 1% quality
gems.notes: Movement speed quality is a minor QoL. Main value is level for skeleton count.

gems.name: Arc
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% increased chaining range per 1% quality
gems.notes: Quality widens the chaining radius, improving clear. Level matters more than quality.

gems.name: Fireball
gems.quality_effect: +1% chance to ignite per 2% quality
gems.notes: Ignite chance quality useful for ignite prolif builds.

gems.name: Minefield Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% increased Mine Throwing Speed per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: throws one additional mine per use vs base.
gems.notes: Core support for mine builds (Pyroclast, Blastchain, etc.).

gems.name: Spell Echo Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% increased cast speed per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: stronger cast speed bonus plus copies deal more damage than base.
gems.notes: Standard double-cast support for spell skills.

gems.name: Greater Multiple Projectiles Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% increased projectile speed per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: reduced damage penalty vs base gem.
gems.notes: GMP is standard for projectile clear. Use with chain/fork for full clear coverage.

gems.name: Elemental Damage with Attacks Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% increased elemental damage per 1% quality
gems.awakened_name: Awakened Elemental Damage with Attacks Support
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: more elemental damage than base gem.
gems.notes: Best-in-slot for elemental attack builds (Tornado Shot, Barrage, etc.).

gems.name: Cast When Damage Taken Support
gems.quality_effect: +1% to damage taken threshold per 1% quality (less triggering)
gems.awakened_name: Awakened Cast When Damage Taken Support
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: can support higher-level gems than base CWDT.
gems.notes: Quality raises the damage threshold, making it trigger less often. Level caps supported gem level.

gems.name: Inspiration Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.25% chance to gain Inspiration Charge per 1% quality
gems.notes: Reduces mana cost and grants occasional elemental damage bonus charge.

gems.name: Hypothermia Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% chance to freeze per 1% quality
gems.awakened_improvement: Level 5: stronger more cold damage against chilled/frozen enemies.
gems.notes: Requires enemy to be chilled or frozen. Pairs with Added Cold Damage or Frost Bomb.

gems.name: Trinity Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% increased resonance gain rate per 1% quality
gems.notes: Requires dealing all three elemental damage types to stack resonance for damage bonus.

gems.name: Pinpoint Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.25% chance to gain a Preparation per 1% quality
gems.notes: Builds up Preparation stacks for a powerful Concentrated Effect bonus. Projectile spells.

gems.name: Impending Doom Support
gems.quality_effect: +0.5% increased doom gain rate per 1% quality
gems.notes: Triggers a damaging explosion when the curse reaches max doom. Curse builds.
